criteria.evidence: docs/PROJECT_ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA.md Required Commands; src/root.zig help_text and route cover init/version/check/list-mutants/run/doctest (+ explain/suggest/review-snapshot/suggest-missing/explain-survivor) and explain/suggest/review-tests

src/root.zig mutators namespace + docs/MUTATOR_SPEC.md: the 12 stable operators (arithmetic_add_sub, arithmetic_mul_div, equality_swap, comparison_boundary, logical_and_or, boolean_literal, optional_orelse_unreachable, optional_null_check, error_catch_unreachable, errdefer_remove, integer_literal_boundary, loop_boundary)
text/json/jsonl/junit renderers (src/report_text.zig, report_jsonl.zig, report_junit.zig) derive from the canonical report.v1 model; schemas/report.v1.schema.json
scripts/validate_task_system.py project-owned schema subset validator; docs/SCHEMA_REGISTRY.md registers every schema with a file
scripts/ci.sh runs format/build/test/task-system/pipeline-artifact/advisory-dogfood/release-dogfood-gate with no remote AI provider
AI commands use the stub + local provider interface and never set mutant classification, report status, or any deterministic-core decision (tasks 053-055, 067)
default config [backend] default = "ast", experimental = []; ZIR (056) and AIR (057) backends are opt-in and never re-tag the stable AST result
